title: GenGen Team
description: GenGen Team: Illuminating the OI tools ecosystem with open source.
heroTagline: Illuminating OI tools ecosystem with open source
heroTitle: Hello, we are the GenGen Team
heroDescription: A small team composed of OIers and developers, creating handy tools in our spare time: from desktop toolboxes to online scripts, focusing on simplicity, stability, and scalability.
starsMessage: Stars, shares, and donations are all fuel that drives us forward.
projectsSubtitle: Modular, one-stop, real-world scenario oriented toolset.
toolboxDescription: Desktop toolbox for OIers, developed with C++ based on raylib. Integrates navigation, check-in, MC launcher, script market and other functions, providing one-stop service with modular design for easy expansion[...]

toolboxFeatures.modular: Modular: Enable and combine functional modules as needed
toolboxFeatures.oneStop: One-stop: Centralized management from daily check-in to tool launching
toolboxFeatures.crossPlatform: Cross-platform potential: Lightweight interface based on raylib graphics layer

cfRmjDescription: A script for directly submitting Codeforces problems on the Luogu platform. Reduces page switching and manual paste operations, improving problem-solving fluency.

cfRmjRequirements.prerequisite: Prerequisite: Have and be logged into a CF account
cfRmjRequirements.environment: Environment recommendation: Install Violentmonkey/Tampermonkey, recommend Edge + Violentmonkey
cfRmjRequirements.installGuide: Installation guide: Get the latest .user.js script and allow the manager to take over

installSteps: Install a script manager in your browser (recommend Edge with Violentmonkey).
Visit the GitHub link above, find the latest .user.js for CF RMJ.
Click the script file, the manager will prompt for installation; confirm and it will take effect on Luogu sites.
Ensure you are logged into your Codeforces account, otherwise submissions will fail.
luoguIntlDescription: Used to optimize the viewing experience of Luogu International version in China (similar to luogu.me).

luoguIntlFeatures.speed: Access speed: Extremely fast (Cloudflare global edge network)
luoguIntlFeatures.features: Feature scope: Complete proxy for luogu.com (users/columns, etc.)
luoguIntlFeatures.usage: Usage: Simply replace the domain in the original Luogu International site link with lg.gengen.qzz.io

usageInstructions: Simply replace the domain in the original Luogu International site link with lg.gengen.qzz.io
⛔ Not affiliated with Luogu official team;
⛔ All content copyright belongs to the original site luogu.com, this site only provides proxy functionality;

supportDescription: We develop and maintain open source projects in our spare time after academic work. Your support helps us cover basic costs and continuously refine the experience.
